L1_headline: SEM – CEO employment agreement renewed effective Jan 2026. | 12/19/25
L2_brief: Select Medical Holdings subsidiary entered into a new employment agreement with CEO Thomas P. Mullin effective January 1, 2026, with a $700,000 annual base salary and automatic one-year renewal terms. This is a routine executive compensation matter with no direct merger or deal implications.

L3_detailed.event: Select Medical Corporation, wholly owned subsidiary of Select Medical Holdings Corporation, executed new employment agreement with CEO Thomas P. Mullin
key_figures: Initial term: 1 year with automatic successive 1-year renewals
Severance: 12 months base salary if terminated without Cause
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition transaction involved; this is a standard executive employment agreement renewal with no impact on any pending deals
remaining_conditions: None - employment agreement is fully executed
risks_flagged: Reference to existing change of control letter dated February 18, 2021 may contain provisions relevant to any future M&A activity
